programme.title: Masti
programme.desc: Three henpecked friends tired of their respective marriage decide to spice up their lives by indulging in an extramarital affair. But things go downhill very quickly when they become the prime suspects in a deadly murder case.

programme.title: KYA KOOL HAIN HUM 3
programme.desc: The Movie Club

programme.title: Guddu Ki Gun
programme.desc: A washing powder salesman, Guddu, finds himself in a quandary when his girlfriend's grandfather casts a spell on him after he ditches her. Guddu must now find true love and stay loyal to her in order to get rid of the curse.

programme.title: Bhoot
programme.desc: A married couple rents a beautiful, spacious apartment at a ridiculously cheap price only to find out that it is haunted. What follows is a series of eerie and hair-raising supernatural episodes in the house.

programme.title: Captain
programme.desc: V P Sathyan, a professional Indian footballer, goes through various ups and downs in his career as he strives hard to fulfil his ambitions.

programme.title: Masters
programme.desc: Milan Paul, a reporter, and Sriramakrishnan, a police officer, are best friends who always help each other. When they investigate a series of suicide-murders, they discover some shocking truths.

programme.title: Daring Rakhwala
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: Chota Johny
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: Black Cobra
programme.desc: Sizwe Biko, an ordinary man with extraordinary skills as a martial artist. He wants nothing more than to live a simple life, but is thrust into a fight for his father's freedom, a leftover casualty of South Africa's former Apartheid mandates.

programme.title: Guardians
programme.desc: Twilight Cove, a small forgotten town, is besieged by hideous creatures summoned into our dimension. It's only a matter of time before the army of creatures attacks the rest of civilization and wreaks havoc upon the world. At dusk, a beat-up truck containing a rag-tag team of hardened mercenaries rolls into town, and this is not the first time they've been called in to exterminate they are part of a secret society that has been operating outside of the government and the public eye for thousands of years. Their mission is to keep our world safe from evil-of our own creation and from beyond.

programme.title: The Landlord
programme.desc: Alyssa moves into a luxury apartment complex but is unaware she is being watched by her disturbed landlord, Robert, via hidden cameras. Robert will do anything to fill the void left by his estranged daughter--even if that means replacing her.

programme.title: The Landlord
programme.desc: Alyssa moves into a luxury apartment complex but is unaware she is being watched by her disturbed landlord, Robert, via hidden cameras. Robert will do anything to fill the void left by his estranged daughter--even if that means replacing her.

programme.title: Revenge Of Robert
programme.desc: Infamous killer doll Robert does battle with Hitler's henchmen aboard a train in Nazi Germany.

programme.title: Guardians

programme.title: Black Cobra
programme.desc: Sizwe Biko, an ordinary man with extraordinary skills as a martial artist. He wants nothing more than to live a simple life, but is thrust into a fight for his father's freedom, a leftover casualty of South Africa's former Apartheid mandates.

programme.title: The Landlord
programme.desc: Alyssa moves into a luxury apartment complex but is unaware she is being watched by her disturbed landlord, Robert, via hidden cameras. Robert will do anything to fill the void left by his estranged daughter--even if that means replacing her.

programme.title: Lights in the Sky
programme.desc: This film shows never-before-seen footage with scientific explanations, from the quantum to the biological.

programme.title: Steve Martini's The Judge
programme.desc: The reputation of Paul Madriani, the much-admired lawyer is at stake as he is called to defend Judge Acosta.

programme.title: Beta Test
programme.desc: Max Troy discovers events in a new video game which are being mirrored in the real world.

programme.title: Michael Jackson: The Journey
programme.desc: Michael Jackson grew quickly into the superstardom that would both reward and plague his controversial career.

programme.title: 5ive Days to Midnight
programme.desc: It's been ten years since J.T. Neumeyer's beloved wife Katherine died giving birth to his daughter Jesse.

programme.title: In The Cage
programme.desc: Marvin Fields is caught up with challenges and obstacles. On the verge of losing his family, he has to step up and face his adversaries. Marvin tries different avenues to help eliminate these difficulties, but his efforts are futile. Now, he decides to take desperate measures in saving his family and finances. When hell breaks loose and nothing seems to work, a true character is revealed through Marvin. Later on, Marvin discovers martial arts through his best friend Frank Biggs. This martial art will help Marvin find himself again and give him a sense of purpose. As he continues to search deeper his new found art, his troubles aren't stagnant. Marvin still has to wake up and face the demons of his life. Marvin has got to get his life out of this never diminishing cage and find freedom. In the meantime, Claire Fields (Marvin's wife) is fed up and tired of supporting the family. Marvin's cage seems invisible to Claire, and this continues to trigger his frustration. In the end, true love and friendship will be revealed and seem to help break down the barriers around this mysterious cage.

programme.title: Caesar
programme.desc: A black & white, film noir fashioned as a 40's gangster movie adaption from the classic Shakespearean stage-play 'Julius Caesar'.

programme.title: Preying for Mercy
programme.desc: As he contends with an efficient and ruthless hit man sent after his family, Frank enlists the aid of his partners to put a stop to the on-coming assault. As the hit man zeros in and Frank is running out of time, he makes the only move he has left? the go on the run again, this time to secure the one secret he has left that could turn the tables around and turn him from the hunted to the hunter.After letting a bust go bad in New York he fled for his life and changed his identity. Now, nearly 15 years later, his past has caught up with him and the truths he worked so hard to hide are clawing their way to the surface.James and Genie an estranged couple must go all the way to Vegas to rekindle a lost sparkle in their LAPD Detective Frank Gates is a hard working cop, a loving father and husband, and an all around good man. But beneath his gleaming veneer of happiness and stability lay a buried past wrought with secrets and violence.

programme.title: Hit-and-Run Squad
programme.desc: Min-jae, a rookie police officer with a natural born talent for driving, is assigned to the perfect team: the Hit-and-Run Squad. But at the same time, for police detective Si-yeon, it is a place she is unjustly demoted to for doing her job. The two team up to arrest the rich and powerful speed maniac Jae-chul who is suspected of committing crimes for his obsession for speed.

programme.title: Midnight Runners
programme.desc: Ki-joon and Hee-yeol become best friends at the police academy, despite differences in their personality. During their outing, they witness a kidnapping incident and report it to the police right away. However, because of the lack of evidence, the investigation doesn't progress while precious time is being wasted. Ki-joon and Hee-yeol decide to take the investigation into their own hands. The only problem is they have zero experience in a real investigation.

programme.title: Santoshi Maa
programme.desc: Santoshi Maa is a Hindi spiritual drama television series starring Gracy Singh, Ratan Rajput and Ayaz Ahmed. The story revolves around Santoshi, a kind-hearted devotee of Goddess Santoshi Maa

programme.title: Mrs.Kaushik Ki Paanch Bahuyein
programme.desc: Mr and Mrs Kaushik have five sons, all of whom are married and well settled. However, their journey gets intriguing as they welcome five daughters-in-law, all from different cultural backgrounds.

programme.title: Naagin Vaadon Ki Agnipariksha
programme.desc: Naaginn is a Hindi supernatural drama television series starring Khushi Dubey, Sayantani Ghosh and Manav Gohil. The story revolves around a serpent, Amrita, who transforms into a woman to avenge the death of her parents

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Dahej Daasi
programme.desc: This Story Is About A 19Year Old Girl Named Chunari, Who Dreams Of Marriage And A Happy Family. However, She Becomes Entangled In The Chains Of Deceit, Finding Herself On The Path To Becoming A Dahej Daasi, Which Is A Tradition Still Prevalent In The Backward Regions Of Rajasthan. The Show Unfolds Into A Compelling Drama Of Tradition Versus Rebellion, Love Versus Oppression.

programme.title: Dhartiputra Nandini
programme.desc: Dhartiputra Nandini Tells The Story Of A Farmer Girl Who Wants To Stay Connected To Her Land. At The Same Time, Akash Returns From America. Sumitra Devi Wishes That His Grandson Akash Should Take Over The Entire Business By Becoming “Ceo.” At The Same Time, Her Family Is Falling Apart, And She Needs An Ideal Daughter-In-Law Who Understands The Responsibility Of Being Her Daughter-In-Law. She Sees Nandini As That, But Akash Refuses To Accept Her Since She Is Not Educated. Nandini Proves That She Is The Best, Both As A Supporter And A Life Partner. She Is There For Akash'S Family In Every Circumstance. This Is The Journey Of “Dhartiputra Nandini” From “Life Partner For Life” To “Charioteer.” In Addition, She Manages His Business. Nandini Also Fulfills Akash'S Dreams And Makes The Name Of The Country Known To The Entire World

programme.title: Jamai Raja
programme.desc: Jamai Raja is a tale of Siddharth Khurana (Sid), an hotelier, who falls in love with Roshni, a social worker. Sidhharth marries Roshni and lives with his in-laws. Siddharth, despite being an owner of a 7-star hotel, gives up his high-class

programme.title: Laal Banarasi
programme.desc: The Story Highlights The Exploitation Happening With The ‘Bunkars' In Banaras, Whose Craft Is Appreciated All Around The World, But They Are Paid Peanuts By The Traders. Amidst This, Blooms A Love Story Between The Two Opposites – Gauri, A Bunkar And Garv, A Trader. The Story Is Of Gauri Who Belongs To The Bunkar Community Facing A Series Of Incidents That Destroy Her Family And Swears To Bring About A Change In Their Life And Stop The Exploitation By Directly Trading The Sarees. This Becomes A Battle With Traders Creating Hurdles In Her Life But She Is Unstoppable.

programme.title: Beti Hamari Anmol
programme.desc: In this hugely inspirational success story, Anmol, a small town girl, not only fights the societal obstacles faced by any small town girl in our country but also takes on the social stigma she has had to face for being so short heighted that she has been termed as a “dwarf”. Anmol, with her strong will power and belief in herself, fights the hate she has had to receive from her in-law's. Anmol becomes a doctor with the support of her husband, in the same hospital where her father works as a peon, to win back her dignity as well as bring a lot of pride to her and her in law's family.

programme.title: Picnic
programme.desc: Jerry grows into a giant after wearing a special ring gadget. Jane tries to evade him but is eventually captured and carried around like a toy. She manages to escape by using the ring to shrink Jerry back to his normal size. They reconcile, and Jane playfully throws the ring away, bringing an end to their giant-sized adventure.

programme.title: Out of Memory
programme.desc: Unknown to the world, Thomas Edison built a secret lab where he invented a virtual version of himself and a robot named Von Bolt. With Edison as their guide, Angie and friends JD, Kent and Nicky set out to explore the fascinating world of science

programme.title: Drone Attack
programme.desc: Jerry's mischievous behavior leads to a mess of toys and books scattered around the living room. Jane tries to catch the thrown objects but ends up getting hit herself. However, Jerry realizes Jane's sadness and starts helping her collect the items. They work together, with Jerry attempting to balance a pile of books and Jane using a box to collect the toys. After some mishaps, they successfully gather everyt_hing, but when the box breaks, they find themselves buried under the pile. They laugh together, realizing the joy in their shared experience.

programme.desc: Jerry's TV time is interrupted by Jane, who introduces him to an interactive book of alphabets and images. The scene ends with a _hint of more playful learning adventures to come

programme.title: Flying a kite
programme.desc: The adorable cubbies want to fly kites but struggle to launch their kites in the sky. With the power of cuddles, they embark on a magical adventure, learning the art of kite flying and discovering the str_hinth of their friendship.

programme.desc: JERRY, a curious and mischievous toddler, playing on the floor withsome toys. He notices amagic marker on the coffee table and picks it up.He starts to draw on the walls and furniture, creating colorful and abstract designs.

programme.desc: Jane and jerry see the seagull perched on a tree with a nest full of their belongings. They try to climb up thetree to retrieve their t_hings, but the seagull fiercely defends its nest and make Jane and Jerry tobackoff

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Ep 49
programme.desc: This light-hearted comic romp, designed for children between the ages of 4 and 12, is set in a lovely wooded wonderland in rural Northeast China. Though the surroundings might seem idyllic, deep in the heart of the region peace has been disrupted by the dastardly Logger Vick, who schemes to transform the majestic forest into his own personal lumberyard!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Sunsational Summer Ep 49
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu: Sunsational Summer is the latest installment in the rip roaring adventures following Briar and Bramble in their hilarious quest to stop Logger Vick's tree cutting antics. These summer episodes take our favorite characters on all new adventures through underwater chases, surviving the great outdoors, meeting new monsters, and many more exciting hijinx. The bear brothers and all of their friends unite again to save their home and teach Vick and all of us the importance of working together to protect our forest.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster Paln S1 Ep 44
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster Paln S1 Ep 45
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Armor Monster Ep 25
programme.desc: One day, 12-year-old Zachary once again met the subway "0" which her mother took nine years ago, and the appearance of the subway seems to have some connection with the necklace left by her mother. In order to find her mother, Zachary stepped on the magic subway without hesitation! When the train arrived at the station, Zachary found that he had come to a magical world of elves. He also met the elf Rooney chased by hunters. In order to protect the Rooney, they fled to the underground city. Here, Zachary meets Scarlett, a red haired girl, and Zachary accidently becomes the Rooney and is regarded as a half-face hunter who is under searched with big bonus in the underground city. In order to leave the underground city to find his mother, Zachary has to agree to fight with the old wizard, the King of the underground city. Under Scarlett's training, Zachary grew up fast. In the battle, his determination to protect the Rooney inspired the strength in the necklace and defeated the old wizard. And just when the angry wizard decided to show his real strength, the real half hunter came to the rescue. The real half hunter even had the same necklace. The unexpected encounter of the two necklaces triggered the emergence of spirits and demons which are eager for energy. In order to protect the underground city from being ravage, the half-face hunter left the underground city with Zachary and his friends. They used their tactics to temporarily eliminate the demons in the stone forest near the beast forest, and they entered the beast forest to avoid refuge.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Cubs S1 Ep 49
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu Cubs is a brand-new edutainment series showing children that learning can be fun. At this scenic Pine Tree Kindergarten, all the cubs observe the world in their own creative and wondrous ways. Here you will learn everything from the value of friendship to exploring the mysteries of science and language.Bablu Dablu Cubs will teach kids how to help others while preparing themselves for life in this beautiful world. This show is a colorful paradise for kids, teeming with adventures around every corner.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Adventure 2 Ep 49
programme.desc: This series follows Vick, Briar and Bramble on brand-new wild adventures. Pine Tree Mountain has become a preserve that draws visitors from all around to see its natural beauty and wildlife. This wildlife now includes some new but familiar residents: Hugo and friends from the hit movie, The Big Top Secret!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Adventure 2 Ep 50

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Ep 49
programme.desc: This light-hearted comic romp, designed for children between the ages of 4 and 12, is set in a lovely wooded wonderland in rural Northeast China. Though the surroundings might seem idyllic, deep in the heart of the region peace has been disrupted by the dastardly Logger Vick, who schemes to transform the majestic forest into his own personal lumberyard!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Ep 50
programme.desc: This light-hearted comic romp, designed for children between the ages of 4 and 12, is set in a lovely wooded wonderland in rural Northeast China. Though the surroundings might seem idyllic, deep in the heart of the region peace has been disrupted by the dastardly Logger Vick, who schemes to transform the majestic forest into his own personal lumberyard!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Sunsational Summer Ep 49
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu: Sunsational Summer is the latest installment in the rip roaring adventures following Briar and Bramble in their hilarious quest to stop Logger Vick's tree cutting antics. These summer episodes take our favorite characters on all new adventures through underwater chases, surviving the great outdoors, meeting new monsters, and many more exciting hijinx. The bear brothers and all of their friends unite again to save their home and teach Vick and all of us the importance of working together to protect our forest.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Ep 50

Though the surroundings might seem idyllic, deep in the heart of the region peace has been disrupted by the dastardly Logger Vick, who schemes to transform the majestic forest into his own personal lumberyard!

programme.title: Paper Tales
programme.desc: Animation series “Paper Tales” narrate to children audience in fascinating way amusing adventures of paper animals – a moose named Aristotle and a woodpecker named Knock-Knock – in paper land where everything is made only from paper. Merry adventures come together with entertaining insets “for crafty hands” when the audience learns how to produce all cartoon characters using paper, cardboard, scissors and glue. The project is supported with the site where all flat patterns are provided with the advices how to manufacture the paper world items.This is the way spectator gets involved into a peculiar game that brings out creative work and development of many useful practical skills, distracting kids from permanent attachment to a computer. The “Paper Tales” project is a fascinating and helpful alternative to computer-oriented pastime. The whole cartoon is accompanied by off-screen narrator's text and exuberant flow of gags. Each episode is planned to last for 5 minutes (a version without insets – 4 minutes). Technique of performance is 3D computer graphics imitating paper application work.

programme.title: Heroes of Envell
programme.desc: Present days. Saint Petersburg. Four friends – Art, Kira, Phil and Vic are the coolest gamers in school. Eventually they find a suspicious laptop with «Heroes of Envell» game installed on it. Turns out that this very laptop is a portal to another dimension, a game realm which is full of adventures and real-life danger. The game realm is a blend of medieval, steampunk and futurism. You never know what really awaits our heroes. Just like the design of the game, the game logic is very unpredictable. You start with a quest and then it becomes a race right until it all grows into a tricky brainteaser. But be sure about one thing – there is no boring or easy way in here. The game realm is a blend of medieval, steampunk and futurism. You never know what really awaits our heroes. Just like the design of the game, the game logic is very unpredictable. You start with a quest and then it becomes a race right until it all grows into a tricky brainteaser. But be sure about one thing – there is no boring or easy way in here.

programme.title: Magic Lantern
programme.desc: Animation series “Magic Lantern” tells little viewers wonderful adventure stories, based on classic literature plots. Little video games fan Mike and his smart sister Kate watch and discuss each story presented as a strip film. Funny stories will help seeing classic stories from the new side and prove that world classic literature is exciting and interesting.

programme.title: Woodventures
programme.desc: " Woodventures" is an animated series for preschool children. The main characters are wooden toys: Kitty Meow, Doggy Woof-Woof, Piggy Oink, Horsey Yee-Ho-Ho and Elephant Pawoo. The toys live in a small wooden town (the prototype of a child' s play room). Every toy has its own unique personality and reacts to different circumstances appropriately. With the help of the invisible narrator, the toys, along with the audience solve different tasks, play and take part in adventures. " Woodventures" is a musical series with lots of songs and dances. Some of the songs represent our characters and appear in each series, and some of the songs are related to the events in the series, so it is only found in that particular episode.Each episode presents a playful and learning environment.

programme.title: Cutie Cubies
programme.desc: An animation series about the adventures of four aliens - Cubies: Captain, Boatswain, Navigator, and Doctor. Having arrived on our planet and disguised as representatives of the local flora and fauna of the cubic form: a yellow chicken, a red rabbit, a blue aquarium and a bush of green grass, they are learning the diverse phenomena of our planet Earth.

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green's new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he's the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: Cyboars
programme.desc: Part Machine, Part Boar, All Hero!

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn' t! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can' t help being sucked in by Moose' s relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There's just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: The Adventures of Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent is about a young spy with a whole lot to learn, who is paired with a very unlikely partner... his mom!

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Gummy lives in an apartment with his friend Harry the Chameleon, while his other friend Kala the Cat hangs out in a ninja dojo on the roof. Together they go on wild and wacky adventures in their building and hometown. Enjoy the fun and crazy adventures!

programme.title: GATTU S10 EPI 40
programme.desc: In a Fairy Kingdom,there is a group of righteous Five-Spirit Guards who is protecting the locals from evils. They got magic power, for which is GG Bond always dreaming. But driven by the ambition and the lust for the power, some of Five-Spirit Guards attempted to break the peace of the world and forcibly occupy it.

programme.title: Cindrella Ep 20
programme.desc: Young Cinderella, struggling with abuse from her stepmother and stepsisters, receives help from her fairy godmother and animal friends while finding adventure and romance with a dashing man who hides the fact that he is a prince.

programme.title: Jungle Book Ep 45
programme.desc: This story is about, " The adventures of Mowgli, an orphan boy raised by wolves, and his friends in the jungle." Young Mowglu and his animal friends, Bagheera and Baloo, adventur together in the wilderness.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Cubs
programme.desc: An evil logger, Lakkha, tries to turn a forest into his personal lumberyard. However, two bear brothers, Bablu and Dablu, set out to thwart his efforts and have many adventures while doing so.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Cubs
programme.desc: An evil logger, Lakkha, tries to turn a forest into his personal lumberyard. However, two bear brothers, Bablu and Dablu, set out to thwart his efforts and have many adventures while doing so.

programme.title: Kungfu Master Of Zodiac Ep 40
programme.desc: Welcome to 12 Zodiac Way! This is a story of the twelve animals of the Chinese Zodiac like you've never seen them before! Come journey with us to a charming little town called Fortune Valley, where the twelve animal-totems now associated with the Chinese lunar calendar spend their days frolicking merrily, often joining together to pursue a host of colorful projects and plans.

programme.title: Pro Boxing Archive Series
programme.desc: Edwin Rosario vs James Martinez was a super featherweight bout at Caesars Palace Outdoor Arena on September 16, 1981. "Sugar" Ray Leonard vs Bruce Finch, billed as Reno's Got it, was a world welterweight championship match between undisputed world welterweight champion "Sugar" Ray Leonard and NABF welterweight champion Bruce Finch on February 15th, 1982, in the Centennial Coliseum, Reno, Nevada.

programme.title: Pro Boxing Archive Series
programme.desc: Alexis Arguello vs Aaron Pryor 2, coined as The Rematch, was a World Jr. Welterweight Championship Fight between WBA Super Lightweight Champion Aaron Pryor and challenger Alexis Arguello on September 9th, 1983, at Ceasars Palace in Las Vegas, Nevada. Cornelius Boza Edwards vs Rocky Lockridge, in what was considered to be one of the best fights of the eighties, was a lightweight bout between former WBA super-featherweight champion Rocky Lockridge and former European Super-featherweight champion Cornelius Boza Edwards on September 9th, 1983, at Ceasars Palace in Las Vegas, Nevada.

programme.title: Pro Boxing Archive Series
programme.desc: Evander Holyfield vs Dwight Muhammad Qawi 2 was an IBF and WBA Cruiserweight Title Fight between Evander "The Real Deal" Holyfield (16-0) and "The Camden Buzzsaw" Dwight Muhammad (28-4-1) on December 5th, 1987, at the Convention Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey.

programme.title: Kahi Suni
programme.desc: In a land steeped in mysticism, spirituality, and religion, the imagination of the followers has much room to flourish. Stories abound – some based on truth and some only on fractions of the truth. Nevertheless, these stories have enchanted their listeners for eons. Kahi Suni packs away our skepticism and takes us on a ride through the legendary tales of India. Each destination covered in the episodes has been the birthplace of a legend and each legend has given rise to the recognition of that location. Following our host from north to south and east to west, we journey through the land of myths of legends uncovering the origins of evIery story.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Anya Kahaniyaan
programme.desc: Raja Rasoi Aur Anya Kahaniyaan is a culinary history show that explores the food of the royals and their erstwhile states. The show takes it's viewers through an amazing journey of anecdotes, folktales, architecture, art, history and landscape and delves into the unique customs and traditions of the various provinces. All these culminate into beautiful renditions of the recipes unique to those regions. This new season of Raja Rasoi aur Anya Kahaniyaan focuses on the royal families as protagonists and explores their personal stories and journeys that shaped their present day food practices.

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Indipedia
programme.desc: A light and peppy anchor driven half-hour episodic series that explores the reasons, bellefs and logic behind the customs and rituals observed as a norm In India, often so casually that most of us have never really asked why they arethe way they are.

programme.title: Umeed India
programme.desc: If you'd imagine an ace cricketer to host a television show, you can be sure it will be a sports related series. And, Umeed India makes a compelling case. For the first time, versatile cricketer Virender Sehwag will host a television show. Umeed India will showcase groundbreaking stories of diversified, intrepid athletes aiming for glory at Olympics 2020. For the 13-part series, Virender reinstates the fact that Olympic stars never ‘just' appear at the Games. Their stories start in small villages, where they train every day – with one aim in mind – bringing home that Gold. Watch Virender travel to their training bases, chronicling exciting moments in the home environment besides interviewing the athletes' families and coaching staff. The episodes feature inspiring stories of OP Karhana, Suyash Yadav, Avtar Singh and Dutee Chand along with Sakshi Malik, Vinesh Poghat among many other Olympians. Can we find the 2020 medalists for India in 2017?

programme.title: Kahi Suni
programme.desc: In a land steeped in mysticism, spirituality, and religion, the imagination of the followers has much room to flourish. Stories abound – some based on truth and some only on fractions of the truth. Nevertheless, these stories have enchanted their listeners for eons. Kahi Suni packs away our skepticism and takes us on a ride through the legendary tales of India. Each destination covered in the episodes has been the birthplace of a legend and each legend has given rise to the recognition of that location. Following our host from north to south and east to west, we journey through the land of myths of legends uncovering the origins of evIery story.

Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.desc: Chef Craig Wong demystifies gelatin, an essential chef's staple ingredient, in this unique and fascinating episode!

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.desc: Chef Derek Dammann loves and loves cooking with all sorts of fruit, but especially stone fruit including peaches, mangoes, plums, cherries and"... almonds?

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Appreciating island culture, host Michael Bonacini explores the enchanting region of Sardegna and its exceptional cuisine. Michael begins his island feast with a taste of the sea through his seasoned antipasto of Stuffed Snails. Next, Michael prepares a luxurious and delicate Lobster Spaghetti, highlighting the fresh seafood of the region. Moving inland for his secondo, Michael cooks up a traditional dish of Lamb with Artichokes and Saffron, a meal that combines three of Sardegna's most famous ingredients. To end his meal, Michael combines salty and sweet with a dolce of Honey and Cheese Fritters.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: One of Italy's quieter regions, Friuli Venezia Guilia offers iconic decadent dishes, waiting to be discovered. Renowned chef Michael Bonacini begins his exploration of the region with his take on a traditional meal: Cheese Crisp Baskets with Polenta and Mushrooms. This savoury antipasto is an elegant looking dish with humble flavours. For his primo, Michael prepares a unique Poppy Seed, Sage, and Prosciutto Pasta, a dish that is a twist on traditional pasta. Looking for a little heat in his secondo, Michael cooks up a meal of Spicy Tomato Scampi. The sweet meat of the scampi counters the heat of the sauce, creating a delicious flavour combination. To end his meal, Michael looks to the region's Austrian influence by preparing his dolce of Apricot Sweet Buns. Soft, sweet, and light these buns are the perfect way to wrap up a Friuli Venezia Guilia meal.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: Matt and the Team prepare BBQ Sunday Dinner with ingredients from the Farmers Market. Herbed Prime Rib, Grilled Pork Chops with Garlic and Herbs, Roasted Root Veggies with Mustard Glaze, and Yorkshire pudding will please friends and family alike!

programme.title: Holiday Eatz
programme.desc: Our fun and occasionally silly chef-host Kimberly Lallouz is taking on a Game Day menu for whatever bowl, cup, or ring your favourite team is bringing home this year! Wear your team colors and cook along as she updates perennial favourites like Chicken Wings (...grilled and smothered in savoury Suya spice!) and Loaded Nachos (with blue corn chips and decadently vegan with her chipotle-cashew 'cheeze!') Next, her Philly-style cheesy flank steak hoagie is a sure crowd pleaser, and for a final play, it's back to the grill with shrimp skewer made Buffalo-style with hot sauce, butter, and creamy avocado ranch dressing. Game on!

programme.title: Lock Stock And Two Smoking Tikkas
Mariupol town, Ukraine
programme.desc: Mariupol is a city of regional significance in south eastern Ukraine, situated on the north coast of the Sea of Azov at the mouth of the Kalmius river, in the Pryazovia region.

programme.title: San Nicolo dei Mendicoli, Italy
programme.desc: Venice, the dream city in the north of Italy! It is located on 118 islands in the Venetian lagoon, separated by 150 canals and channels with about 400 bridges. Known as the Floating City or the City of Canals, Venice is a true monument city. The church of"&" San Nicolo dei Mendicoli is a historical and artistic achievement, inseparable from the Venetian heritage.

programme.title: Akko (6000 years of History), Israel
programme.desc: One of the most fascinating city: Akko. Discover its historical heritage and enjoy a rare blend of East and West, authentic glimpses from the past, and unique mix of religious beliefs and remnants from different cultures. Akko is one of the most vital Ancient World cities where you can find traces of a great many nations and religious movements ranging from the Canaanites, the Romans, the Byzantines, the Crusaders, the Mamluks and the Turks to the British...

programme.title: Dubai Historic District, United Arab Emirates
programme.desc: Discover the city of the world's tallest skyscraper differently. We invite you to a historical tour of Dubai. See Dubai from where all started through the Middle Eastern markets, traditional houses, and historic streets of the old city.

programme.title: Preza Castle & the Xhamia Preze Mosque, Albania
programme.desc: Preza is one of the most scenic areas of the valley of Tirana. While the Castle has inspired countless stories and legends, its own history will always be dominated by the golden era of the national hero Skanderbeg's resistance against the Ottomans.

programme.title: Andros Town, Andros Island, Cyclades, Greece
programme.desc: Discover Andros Town, the capital of Andros' Island… A city with a significant century-long history, with monuments, churches, and ruins scattered all over the streets, witnessing its long cultural heritage. Andros Town is nothing like a Cycladic capital.

programme.title: Ethno Village-Museum Ljubacke Doline, Bosnia & Herzegovina
programme.desc: Exploring different cultures and experiencing lives utterly different from yours is the best part of discovering new horizons. This kind of experience can be done in one particular place in Bosnia & Herzegovina called Ljubacke Doline. Well, you can transl"&"ate it literally by Kisses Valley. This place is one of the many Ethno villages in the region.

programme.title: Plovdiv, The city on seven hills, Bulgaria
programme.desc: Few places have a history like Plovdiv. Its hilly landscape bears the marks of many great civilizations – from the mysterious Thracian tribes, to ancient Greece and Persia, to the Roman Empire, all the way to the Bulgarian Empire, the Ottomans and even Ts"&"arist Russia. In fact, Plovdiv is one of the oldest cities in Europe.

programme.title: Stamboli's Countryhouse, Crimea
programme.desc: Stamboli Villa is the most beautiful building in the city of Feodosia, located in the Crimean peninsula. It was built from 1909 to 1914. According to the legend, its creator was the leader of the Vienna secession, Otto Wagner. The cottage in Moorish style"&" was built on the order of tobacco manufacturer Josef Stamboli.

programme.title: Fengguo Monastery, China
programme.desc: A royal temple, witness of the Liao Dynasty in China: the Fengguo temple. It is a Buddhist temple possessing profound historical, artistic, scientific and social values. It contains the only extant and tallest wooden structured Buddha pagoda in China.

programme.title: Vannes Old City, France
programme.desc: Old City Walls of Vannes are fortifications built between the 3rd and 17th centuries to protect Vannes' city. It is located on the Gulf of Morbihan at the mouth of two rivers, the Marle and the Vincin, around 450 km southwest of Paris. These ancient city walls are some of the best-preserved in the country.

programme.title: In Alberobello Trulli, Italy
programme.desc: Alberobello is a village in Puglia where ancient traditions still characterize an entire community to this day. Perhaps the masterpiece of Puglia is Alberobello itself. No tourist manual ignores it. Every geography book for middle schools carries a photograph of its Trulli. Alberobello is a perfect village whose formula has become a style in the rigor with which it has been applied.

programme.title: Kaleto Archaeological Complex & Vrachanski Balkan Nature Park, Bulgaria
programme.desc: Located in northwestern Bulgaria, in the Vratsa Province, Mezdra is a small, picturesque town sitting along the left bank of the Iskar River. Discover the historical heritage of a living city: the Kaleto Archaeological Complex and the Vrachanski Balkan Nature Park. They are containing karst landscapes and habitats with more than 600 caves.

programme.title: Ethno Village-Museum Ljubacke Doline, Bosnia & Herzegovina
programme.desc: Exploring different cultures and experiencing lives utterly different from yours is the best part of discovering new horizons. This kind of experience can be done in one particular place in Bosnia & Herzegovina called Ljubacke Doline. Well, you can translate it literally by Kisses Valley. This place is one of the many Ethno villages in the region.

programme.title: The Palace Museum (The Forbidden City), China (Part 1)
programme.desc: The Forbidden City, also known as the Palace Museum, is located in the center of Beijing. From 1368 to 1911, it was the Chinese imperial Palace of the Ming and Qing dynasties. It is a World Heritage Site as one of the best-preserved ancient wooden palace complexes. A documentary series in two episodes.

programme.title: Stamboli's Countryhouse, Crimea
programme.desc: Stamboli Villa is the most beautiful building in the city of Feodosia, located in the Crimean peninsula. It was built from 1909 to 1914.

programme.title: Tigre, the Puerto de Frutos, Argentina
programme.desc: The architectural ensemble of Tigre's rowing clubs is a World Heritage site. The unique factor was the pluralism of nationalities and cultural trends that existed in Argentina at the beginning of the 20th Century.

programme.title: Skopje A Blend Of Heritage, North Macedonia
programme.desc: While easily accessible from all points abroad and boasting all the amenities of the Western world, North Macedonia is still one of Europe's least discovered tourist destinations: a natural paradise of mountains, lakes, and rivers, where life moves to a "&"different rhythm, amidst the sprawling grandeur of rich historical ruins and idyllic villages that have remained practically unchanged for centuries. Skopje is the capital of the Republic of Macedonia in the center of the Balkan Peninsula. In different pe"&"riods of its history, the city was under Roman, Byzantine, and Ottoman rule.
